prompt: A dark, expressionist oil painting of a seated older man in a business suit, posed front-facing on an ornate high-backed throne with gilded finials and carved armrests. He wears a black or very deep burgundy suit, a white dress shirt, and a saturated purple tie, with both hands resting heavily on the throne arms. His hair is light blond to gray-blond, swept back loosely. The face is completely obscured by a centered rectangular blur block in muted brown, creating an unsettling censored effect. The setting is a claustrophobic interior rendered in violent vertical strokes of crimson, scarlet, black, and maroon, as if the walls are bleeding paint downward. The floor is a black-and-white checkerboard pattern, partially broken and smeared by rough brushwork. Use thick impasto, aggressive palette-knife texture, smeared edges, high contrast, and a moody, sinister atmosphere. Composition is symmetrical and centered, full seated figure visible, throne dominating the frame, with a museum-scale portrait feeling and psychological horror undertone.
